urdu transliteration text: Ay chand karbala ke, tu ne to dekhe hongay
english translation text: O the moon of Karbala, you must have seen

urdu transliteration text: Utray thay is zameen par, arshay bari ke tare
english translation text: The stars of the skies descending on the earth

urdu transliteration text: Ay chand jalwagar hai hashim ka chand yan par
english translation text: O moon, the moon of Hashim is illuminating

urdu transliteration text: Khairaat roshni ki lelijiyo yahan se
english translation text: Take away in charity some light from here

urdu transliteration text: Ay chand is zameen par rakhiyo hamesha thandaq
english translation text: O moon, always ensure that this land is nice and cool

urdu transliteration text: Sotay jo hai yahan par zehra ke hai ye pyare
english translation text: As Zahra's loving children are resting here

urdu transliteration text: Tasleem-o-salsabeelo kausar ke hai ye maalik
english translation text: They are the owners and distributors of kausar

urdu transliteration text: Maare gaye jo pyase is nehr ke kanare
english translation text: They got killed thirsty by this river

urdu transliteration text: Hur aur habeeb jaise jaanbaaz aur ahibba
english translation text: The likes of Habeeb and Hur, who were brave and loyal

urdu transliteration text: Maare gaye yaheen par ansaar shahe deen ke
english translation text: Helpers of the religion were killed here

urdu transliteration text: Maare gaye yaheen par be-dardiyo sitam se
english translation text: Over here were killed brutally

urdu transliteration text: Zainab ke dono pyare muslim ke dono bete
english translation text: Both the sons of Zaynab, as well as the children of Muslim

urdu transliteration text: Pamaal ho rahi thi qasim ki laash ran may
english translation text: The corpse of Qasim was being trampled on the battlefield

urdu transliteration text: Abbas aur sarwar chunte thay unke tukday
english translation text: Abbas and Hussain would gather pieces of his body

urdu transliteration text:
Baazu katay yaheen par abbas-e-bawafa ke
Abbas's hands were severed over here
Izne wagha na paaya pani bhi laa na paaye
english translation text: Neither did he get permission to fight, nor did he manage to get water

urdu transliteration text: Is sar zameen pa guzra sarwar pa ye bhi sadma
english translation text: On this land, another tragedy that befell Imam Hussain was that

urdu transliteration text: Seene pa khaayi barchi hamshakle mustufa ne
english translation text: The prophet's look alike (Ali Akbar) was struck with a dagger on his chest

urdu transliteration text:
Pani pilaane laaye ek mehlaka ko sarwar
Imam Hussain brought his 6 month old to ask for water
ki ghazab hurmula ne teere sitam lagaake
english translation text: But Hurmula shockingly struck him with an arrow instead

urdu transliteration text: gardan chidi pisar ki baazu chida padar ka
english translation text: The throat of the child was slit and so was the arm of the father

urdu transliteration text: dono tadap tadap kar pyase jahan se guzre
english translation text: both of them eventually died of intense thirst

urdu transliteration text: is ban may ek bachi baba ko dhoondti thi
english translation text: A young girl was searching for her father on this plain

urdu transliteration text:
bikhre huwe paday thay jab sar bureeda laashar
Beheaded bodie lay scattered here
phir yeh bhi tu ne dekha woh gham raseeda bachi
english translation text: You also witnessed a little girl, who was grief stricken

urdu transliteration text: seene pa so rahi thi besar padar se lipte
english translation text: As she lay on her beheaded father's chest

urdu transliteration text: baazu bandhay yaheen per pehle pahal haram ke
english translation text: the arms of the ladies of the holy household were tied here

urdu transliteration text: is sar zameen se niklay sajjad sar jhukaye
english translation text: Imam Sajjad appeared with his head down from this land

urdu transliteration text: shehzadaye jina hi maalik hai karbala ka
kiski majaal aaye jab tak na wo bulaaye
english translation text: No one dared to step up until he called out

urdu transliteration text:
pahuncha hai karbala may nacheez sibte jafar
A humble servant (Sibte Jafar) arrives in karbala
ay kaash ke muqaddar humko ye din dikhaye
english translation text: This is a hope and dream, that one day this is a reality
